scope: Cycle 21: Bug hunt C20 (0 bugs) + feat HubAntre faction reputation mini-bars & Ogham display
overall_assessment: Bug hunt C20: verified 2 files (journey_map_display.gd, end_run_screen.gd). 3 issues flagged by agent, all false positives: (1) queue_redraw() every frame is intentional for pulse animation on final node, max 12 visible nodes makes it lightweight, (2) get_last_run_data() returns typed Dictionary, never null — .is_empty() always safe, (3) non-Array effects correctly return EventType.CARD fallback. Feature: HubAntre CRT visual polish with faction reputation mini-bars (5 factions, colored threshold bars, live signal updates) and Ogham equipment display (unicode glyphs, equipped/owned states). 29 total bugs fixed across 21 cycles.
